scope: Update the master plan for Bryan's Day 7 full app-flow alpha target while explicitly allowing production user accounts to remain incomplete.
alpha_scope: Full app flow works through seeded/demo personas or a clearly labeled role switcher.
Production login, first-admin bootstrap, invitation/import, password reset, and district SSO are post-alpha hardening tasks.
Student, teacher, mentor, admin, misc-admin, proposal, evidence metadata, review, revision, approval, dashboard, audit/activity, export/archive, mobile, and error/permission paths must be walkable.
verification: Master plan now includes the Day 7 Alpha Gate section and seven-day implementation ladder.
Automation milestones now include M2A - Day 7 Full App-Flow Alpha.
Backlog now includes SC-006 as a P0 alpha-flow item.
blocked: No implementation work was performed in this planning update.
Production account hardening remains required after alpha before pilot use with real student records.
